review_scope_summary: Implementer (commit 36f6643): apps/api/src/media/media.controller.ts — stream error handler attached to fs.createReadStream() in serveImage(): headersSent path destroys socket; ENOENT path returns 404 JSON; other I/O errors return 500 JSON.

Tester (commit 936d222): apps/api/src/media/media.controller.test.ts — vi.mock('node:fs') added; 3 new TOCTOU tests covering ENOENT->404, headersSent->destroy, non-ENOENT->500. 10/10 media controller tests pass.
Documenter (commit 5972d9a): docs/README.md — GET /api/media/:id description updated to document all three TOCTOU stream error handler behaviors.

findings.summary: No happy-path serveImage test (normal pipe-through with file present)
findings.detail: All pre-existing tests cover uploadImage authorization. New tests cover only error paths. No test confirms correct pipe-through for a present file. Not blocking: change does not alter normal path and pre-existing behavior is unchanged.

test_sufficiency_summary: SUFFICIENT. Three new tests cover all acceptance-criterion paths: ENOENT returns 404, headersSent triggers socket destroy, non-ENOENT returns 500. 10/10 media controller tests pass. Minor gap: no happy-path serveImage test (NOTE).
documentation_accuracy_summary: ACCURATE. README update correctly describes all three new behaviors for GET /api/media/:id. No stale references or contradictions found.
